title: Idoumaia #2401
definition:
1) Idumaea, the name of a region between southern Palestine and the
    Arabian Petraea inhabited by Edom or Esau and his posterity
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) Idumaea, the name of a region between southern Palestine and the
    Arabian Petraea inhabited by Edom or Esau and his posterity

    NASB:  Idumea, a region S. of Judea:
